thread.title: France Shines in Swimming, Germany Dominates Equestrian at Summer 2024 Olympics
thread.title_full: France Shines in Swimming, Germany Dominates Equestrian at Summer 2024 Olympics

author: newsdirectory3
title: France Shines in Swimming, Germany Dominates Equestrian at Summer 2024 Olympics
text:
France led the medal count in swimming during the Summer 2024 Olympics. Germany excelled in equestrian events.
The United States topped the overall medal table, with China and Japan following in second and third places, respectively.
In total, France won 16 gold medals. Four of these were from swimming. The UK and the Netherlands also performed well in rowing, capturing three and four golds, while Croatia and Ireland each secured one gold medal.
Georgia earned one of its three gold medals in judo. Denmark won gold in both handball and badminton.
